list.name: Changes
list.comment: Refactor logging system: replace spdlog with foundation logging macros and update calibration file metadata

task.summary: Refactor motor calibration and drive configuration: update Motor class to include calibration parameters and remove unnecessary methods
Add Docker support for building and deploying Python library
Rename config file to raccoon.project.yml, update Python script usage, adjust Python version requirement, and enhance logging initialization
Implement kinematics for differential and mecanum drive systems, including command application and state estimation; enhance motor control with limits and hard stop functionality
Add motion classes for turning and strafing: implement TurnMotion and StrafeMotion with configuration options, odometry reset, and velocity control
Add calibration module and logging enhancements: implement motor calibration methods, update logging initialization, and integrate timing database for step execution tracking
Refactor logging system: replace spdlog with foundation logging macros and update calibration file metadata
Refactor logging system: replace spdlog with foundation logging macros and update calibration file metadata

MESSAGE.value: Refactor motor calibration and drive configuration: update Motor class to include calibration parameters and remove unnecessary methods
Add Docker support for building and deploying Python library
Rename config file to raccoon.project.yml, update Python script usage, adjust Python version requirement, and enhance logging initialization
Implement kinematics for differential and mecanum drive systems, including command application and state estimation; enhance motor control with limits and hard stop functionality
Add motion classes for turning and strafing: implement TurnMotion and StrafeMotion with configuration options, odometry reset, and velocity control
Add calibration module and logging enhancements: implement motor calibration methods, update logging initialization, and integrate timing database for step execution tracking
Refactor logging system: replace spdlog with foundation logging macros and update calibration file metadata

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value: Refactor logging system: replace spdlog with foundation logging macros and update calibration file metadata
